message:
feat(abi-tests): expand startup/setjmp/resource/errno test coverage

- startup_abi: 9 → 20 tests (return propagation, argc edge cases,
  path parsing, init/fini hook combos, snapshot validation)
- setjmp_abi: 10 → 18 tests (prefilled buffers, repeated captures,
  null rejection, mask variations, independent buffers)
- resource_abi: 13 → 25 tests (more resource types, invalid/error
  cases, round-trip patterns, hard>=soft invariant)
- errno_abi: 15 → 21 tests (EWOULDBLOCK=EAGAIN, concurrent writers,
  Linux-specific codes, pointer alignment, stability)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
